title: Musk Says 2 Trillion Parameter Large Model is About to Complete Training, May Challenge Kimi K3 Performance
excerpt: After the release of its new open-source large model, Kimi K3, Moonshot AI, the company behind it, saw Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla, state that its 2-trillion parame
content_html:
After the release of its new open-source large model, Kimi K3, Moonshot AI, the company behind it, saw Elon Musk, CEO of Tesla, state that its 2-trillion parameter-scale model is expected to complete initial training by next week, and he claimed that the overall performance of this model would surpass its previous 1.5-trillion parameter version, and may even exceed Kimi K3.

Prior to this, Musk had commented on the evaluation reports related to Kimi K3, calling it "impressive." On July 18, he further revealed the progress of the new model's training, sparking industry attention on the competition for ultra-large-scale models.

It is known that Kimi K3 has a parameter scale of 2.8 trillion, a context window of up to 1 million words, and supports native visual understanding capabilities, making it one of the largest open-source large models in the world. On the day of its release, it topped the global ranking on the Arena AI front-end programming leaderboard with 1679 points, surpassing overseas mainstream models such as Claude Fable5 and GPT-5.6Sol.

As the competition for large models enters a new phase, parameter scale, reasoning capability, context length, and open-source ecosystems have become key areas of contention among manufacturers. xAI, the AI company under Musk's leadership, has been continuously advancing large model R&D in recent years. The recent announcement of progress on its 2-trillion parameter model also highlights the increasingly intense technological competition among global AI companies for the next-generation foundational models.

sentences.zh: 在其新开源大型模型Kimi K3发布后，背后公司Moonshot AI看到特斯拉CEO埃隆·马斯克表示，其2万亿参数规模的模型预计下周完成初步训练，并声称该模型的整体性能将超越之前的1.5万亿参数版本，甚至可能超过Kimi K3。

On the day of its release, it topped the global ranking on the Arena AI front-end programming leaderboard with 1679 points, surpassing overseas mainstream models such as Claude Fable5 and GPT-5.6Sol.

sentences.zh: 据了解，Kimi K3参数规模达2.8万亿，上下文窗口高达100万字，并支持原生视觉理解能力，是全球最大的开源大型模型之一。

sentences.en: On the day of its release, it topped the global ranking on the Arena AI front-end programming leaderboard with 1679 points, surpassing overseas mainstream models such as Claude Fable5 and GPT-5.6Sol.
sentences.zh: 发布当天，以1679分登上Arena AI前端编程排行榜全球排名第一，超越Claude Fable5、GPT-5.6Sol等海外主流机型。

The recent announcement of progress on its 2-trillion parameter model also highlights the increasingly intense technological competition among global AI companies for the next-generation foundational models.

sentences.en: xAI, the AI company under Musk's leadership, has been continuously advancing large model R&D in recent years.
sentences.zh: 马斯克领导下的人工智能公司xAI近年来不断推进大模型研发。

sentences.en: The recent announcement of progress on its 2-trillion parameter model also highlights the increasingly intense technological competition among global AI companies for the next-generation foundational models.
sentences.zh: 近期其2万亿参数模型的进展也凸显出全球人工智能企业对于下一代基础模型的技术竞争日趋激烈。

content_html_zh:
在其新开源大型模型Kimi K3发布后，背后公司Moonshot AI看到特斯拉CEO埃隆·马斯克表示，其2万亿参数规模的模型预计下周完成初步训练，并声称该模型的整体性能将超越之前的1.5万亿参数版本，甚至可能超过Kimi K3。

此前，马斯克曾评价Kimi K3相关评测报告，称其“令人印象深刻”。 7月18日，他进一步透露了新模型训练进展，引发业界对超大规模模型争夺的关注。

据了解，Kimi K3参数规模达2.8万亿，上下文窗口高达100万字，并支持原生视觉理解能力，是全球最大的开源大型模型之一。 发布当天，以1679分登上Arena AI前端编程排行榜全球排名第一，超越Claude Fable5、GPT-5.6Sol等海外主流机型。

随着大模型竞争进入新阶段，参数规模、推理能力、上下文长度、开源生态等成为厂商争夺的重点领域。 马斯克领导下的人工智能公司xAI近年来不断推进大模型研发。 近期其2万亿参数模型的进展也凸显出全球人工智能企业对于下一代基础模型的技术竞争日趋激烈。
